title: Functional Storage Fabric
description: An unofficial Fabric port of the Functional Storage mod.
body:
# Functional Storage (Fabric)

This is an unofficial Fabric port of the [Functional Storage](https://github.com/Buuz135/FunctionalStorage) mod.

## Credits

*   **Original Author:** [Buuz135](https://github.com/Buuz135)
*   **Fabric Port Maintainer:** [Koudesuk](https://github.com/Koudesuk)

## License

This project is licensed under the MIT License - see the [LICENSE](LICENSE) file for details.

---

## Support

If you like this project and want to support development:

[![Support me on Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/koudesuk)

**Note to Contributors:** This mod migration is not yet complete, and many bugs still exist. If you are a contributor interested in improving this migration, please feel free to contact me at `koudesuk105@gmail.com`.
